demographics.living_situation: lives at home with a caregiver present

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My hands are locking up into claws, my lips are completely numb, and I can't lift my arms anymore. Please help — it's getting worse and I feel really weak and sick.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The spasms and numbness came on over the last few hours and the weakness is getting worse fast — the caregiver rang because the patient can no longer stand and is confused and slow to respond.

symptom_narrative.onset: the cramping and spasms started about 12 hours ago; the numbness around the lips came first, and the arm and leg weakness has come on over the last 4 hours
symptom_narrative.character: severe painful cramps that pull the hands into a claw shape, tingling and total numbness around the lips, and a heavy weakness that means the patient can't lift their arms or walk
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst spasms the patient has ever had — extremely painful and frightening
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: hands and feet cramping, face and lips numb and twitching, arms and legs weak
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and getting worse since it began
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it keeps worsening on its own; the patient feels more breathless and panicky when the spasms peak
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: nausea with two episodes of vomiting today, severe tiredness, and the caregiver says the patient has been confused and slow to respond this evening
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: bedbound and unable to walk because of the painful spasms and weakness

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a recent prolonged stomach and bowel illness with diarrhoea and vomiting
past_medical_history.when_diagnosed: over the past couple of weeks
past_medical_history.how_managed: recently finished a course of broad-spectrum antibiotics for it

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a course of antibiotics that was just finished

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives at home; a caregiver is present and made the call because the patient became unable to walk and confused

objective_data_offered.value: visible painful spasms drawing both hands into a claw/clenched position; twitching around the mouth and cheek
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: Observed by the caregiver on video; not a clinician-elicited sign.

objective_data_offered.value: caregiver reports the patient is confused, slow to respond, extremely weak, unable to lift the arms or stand, and has vomited twice today
caregiver reports the numbness and tingling started around the lips before the hand and foot cramping began
